title: AgroRange: Agricultural IoT Platform
description: An agricultural monitoring and management platform consisting of a .NET 9 backend API, an Expo-based mobile app (SmartChyau), and a Next.js admin dashboard. The system enables real-time IoT sensor data collection, threshold-based alerting, farm and product management, educational content delivery, and role-based access control. It supports cross-platform mobile access (iOS/Android) and a centralized web dashboard for administrators and farmers.

KeyRoleDetails.details: Designed and developed a RESTful API with Firebase authentication, JWT, RBAC, and 2FA.
Built time-series data ingestion and real-time alerting systems for IoT sensor monitoring.

Implemented RabbitMQ message queue to handle high-frequency IoT log ingestion from 10+ devices per farm sending data every 3 seconds, preventing database bottlenecks and ensuring reliable asynchronous processing.
Developed a worker service to consume queued IoT logs, process threshold evaluations, and publish real-time updates via SignalR to both mobile app and admin dashboard.
Implemented SignalR for real-time messaging and notification services.
Optimized database performance with indexing, query optimization, and caching strategies.
Developed a cross-platform mobile app (iOS/Android) with Expo for farm monitoring and IoT control.
Integrated real-time sensor visualization, ESP device control, and chat via SignalR.
Implemented state management (Zustand), API integration layer, and offline-capable media uploads.
Built learning modules, FAQ, product catalog, and report generation with export features.
Built a responsive admin panel with role-based access control for both admin and user sections.
Integrated real-time IoT analytics dashboards (ApexCharts) and SignalR-based live chat.
Developed CRUD modules for farm, product, user, category, and learning content management.
Implemented advanced tables (TanStack), form validation (React Hook Form + Zod), and media management.

KeyAchievementDetails.details: Successfully delivered a complete agricultural IoT ecosystem across backend, mobile, and web platforms in structured phases, meeting all functional and performance requirements.
Architected a RabbitMQ-based log ingestion pipeline capable of handling burst traffic from hundreds of IoT devices concurrently, ensuring zero data loss and real-time dashboard updates via SignalR.
Enabled real-time farm monitoring and alerting through seamless integration of IoT sensor data, SignalR messaging, and threshold-based notifications.
Built a scalable and maintainable architecture with RBAC, API versioning, caching, and cross-platform support, ensuring security and performance.
Delivered user-centric features including interactive dashboards, educational content, product catalogs, report generation, and real-time communication tools, empowering farmers and administrators.

title: Game Development with Admin Panel
description: This project involved the end-to-end design, development, and deployment of a cross-platform casino-style game with an integrated administrative dashboard. The game was built for Android, iOS, and Web platforms, followed by the creation of a comprehensive CMS to manage game content, users, and transactions.

KeyRoleDetails.details: Designed, coded, tested, and deployed a Unity-based game for Android, iOS, and Web platforms, including a main game and six mini-games.
Ensured cross-platform functionality and performance optimization across all target devices.
Delivered a fully functional game prototype, followed by the complete game suite, and provided post-deployment maintenance for three months.
Handled source code and documentation delivery after each development phase.
Developed and maintained a full-featured CMS admin dashboard using React and Next.js with Tailwind CSS, enabling real-time content management, user analytics, and game oversight.
Built RESTful APIs and backend services using C# and .NET to support player authentication, data persistence, and real-time interactions.
Integrated Stripe for secure in-game payments and subscription handling.
Created an intuitive and responsive UI/UX for administrative tools, empowering non-technical stakeholders to manage game content efficiently.

KeyAchievementDetails.details: Successfully delivered the project in clear, structured phases—from game prototype to full deployment and maintenance, followed by a scalable admin dashboard—meeting all approval gates and functionality requirements.
Delivered a maintainable and user-friendly admin platform that enabled efficient content and user management post-launch.

title: My Portfolio Website
description: This is my Portfolio Website, where I provide a brief introduction about myself, highlight my professional experiences, and share my contact details. Additionally, there is a form that allows anyone to send me a message directly via email.

KeyRoleDetails.details: Built the website using Next.js, React hooks, and TypeScript for type safety.
Learned Next.js and debugged independently.
Created a responsive, user-friendly interface with Tailwind CSS.

KeyAchievementDetails.details: Implemented a contact form with email integration for direct messaging.
Deployed successfully using GitHub Actions to GitHub Pages.
Created a professional portfolio showcasing skills and projects with smooth animations.

title: Food Cost Management System
description: This system is a comprehensive Restaurant Management System with features for Point of Sale (POS), Inventory, and Payroll Generation. The system aims to streamline operations, enhance customer experience, and improve staff efficiency.

KeyRoleDetails.details: Converted the existing .NET 2 MVC app to .NET 6 and also involved in creating new modules in React.
Converted existing web services into REST APIs in NestJS.
Involved in creating a separate new application written in Java and Angular.
Took responsibility for given modules, communicated with the PM for requirements, and coordinated with team members to complete tasks.
Created architecture for the API in Next.js.
Worked with Jira and agile methodology and also involved in the code review process.

KeyAchievementDetails.details: Gained experience with EC2 servers, S3 buckets, and used Azure and Git for CI/CD pipelines.
Successfully converted the project from an older version of .NET to the latest .NET 6.

title: Transdoclink Cargo Logistics
description: This system is a comprehensive solution designed to streamline the process of managing cargo shipments. It enables users to create and manage detailed records of cargo shipments, including invoices, cargo information, and real-time location tracking. This system aims to provide efficient and accurate cargo management capabilities, facilitating seamless communication between shippers, carriers, and customers, ultimately enhancing overall supply chain operations.

KeyRoleDetails.details: Coordinated with business analysts for project requirements and created technical documentation.
Communicated with cross-functional teams, including QA, UI/UX, and product management, to ensure smooth project execution.
Implemented Scrum to enhance team productivity and efficiency.
Created architecture for the project, helped team members resolve tasks, and was involved in the code review process.

KeyAchievementDetails.details: As a team lead, maintained communication channels among team members to develop software for cargo logistics.
Implemented Azure for kanban board and CI/CD pipeline for smooth deployment.

title: Multi-Vendor E-commerce & Logistics Platform
description: Developed a comprehensive multi-vendor e-commerce and logistics platform enabling local businesses to manage online storefronts, inventory, payments, and order fulfillment through a centralized admin dashboard and mobile applications. The system supports super-admin oversight, individual shopkeeper dashboards, real-time parcel tracking, and in-app chat between customers and vendors—delivering a full-cycle retail and restaurant management MVP.

KeyRoleDetails.details: Architected and built an Angular admin dashboard with NGRX for state management, allowing super-admins and shopkeepers to onboard, customize stores, manage inventory, track logistics, and view payment analytics.
Developed two React Native mobile apps (consumer e-commerce and rider logistics) using Redux for state consistency, featuring real-time geo-tracking, multi-vendor shopping, and chat functionality.
Designed and implemented .NET Core APIs to handle mobile app data, vendor/order processing, real-time notifications, and integration with mapping and payment services.
Collaborated on system architecture and database design to support multi-tenancy, scalable vendor management, and seamless order-to-delivery workflows.

KeyAchievementDetails.details: Successfully launched a working multi-store MVP within deadline, integrating web (Angular), mobile (React Native), and backend (.NET Core) into a unified platform.
Implemented scalable state management using Redux in React Native apps and NGRX in Angular, ensuring consistent data flow and real-time UI updates across vendor dashboards and mobile interfaces.
Enabled real-time parcel tracking and chat—key differentiators that improved customer engagement and operational transparency for small business vendors.

title: QR-Based Price Tag System for Multi-Store
description: Mobile Application Development that enables store staff to generate and print QR-based price tags for products using a centralized system, and scan those tags via a mobile application to instantly retrieve detailed product information, reducing manual entry errors and improving inventory tracking accuracy.

KeyRoleDetails.details: Worked on APIs to handle product data management, QR generation, and real-time inventory updates between the mobile app and the backend system.
Enabled scanning of product labels to view product details (pricing, stock levels, supplier info) and update inventory status directly from the app.

KeyAchievementDetails.details: Delivered MVP from QR tag printing to mobile scanning and real-time data synchronization.
Successfully integrated third-party QR libraries and print services, enabling seamless label generation and offline-capable mobile scanning for store environments.

title: GBcare Case Management System
description: This system is designed to provide comprehensive and efficient medical assistance to nurses and healthcare professionals, ensuring they have access to the necessary resources and support to deliver high-quality patient care. It seamlessly integrates with existing health insurance systems, streamlining claims processing, billing, and reimbursement, while also offering a range of value-added services that cater to the unique needs of nursing staff.

KeyRoleDetails.details: Worked as a Team Lead, coordinating with business analysts for requirements and creating tasks among team members.
Involved in helping team members and reviewing their code to maintain code structure.
Converted the existing application to .NET MVC with Domain Driven Design and SSRS.
Complex business logic was written in stored procedures and views in the database to optimize the reporting system.
Conducted extensive testing and debugging to ensure system stability and accuracy of data processing.
Worked on support to handle bugs after system deployment.

KeyAchievementDetails.details: Led a group of 5 developers in a .NET MVC project, undertaking the SDLC of the whole project.
Gained experience with Web API and SQL BI for reporting (SSRS).
Implemented robust and scalable solutions to handle complex health data, workflows, and compliance requirements.
Successfully delivered a comprehensive health case management system within the given timeframe and received positive feedback from clients.

title: Loyalty Program for Retail Shop
description: This system is an innovative platform designed to reward and engage loyal customers of an iconic retail brand. This system aims to create a personalized experience for each customer, fostering long-term relationships and driving repeat business.

KeyRoleDetails.details: Worked on design documents and technical documents.
Created different unit test cases in NUnit.
Worked in business layer, data conversion, DTOs, and modules.
Gained understanding of two-way binding JavaScript library, Knockout.js.
Created various client-side validations in JavaScript.

KeyAchievementDetails.details: Enhanced knowledge of software design patterns and architecture (Domain Driven Design).
Enhanced web development skills.
Worked on various documentation like design documents and technical documents.

title: Cooperative Financial Management System
description: This project is a web-based cooperative software designed to manage client savings accounts, track transactions, and generate accurate financial reports including Trial Balance, Balance Sheets, and other key performance indicators.

KeyRoleDetails.details: Learned web-based structure in ASP.NET with user controls and client-side validations.
Worked on SQL stored procedures and functions for report generation.
Worked on log maintenance to handle errors and downtime of the project.

KeyAchievementDetails.details: Enhanced web application development with interactive UI in ASP.NET MVC.
Optimized performance by improving queries in stored procedures.
Deployed the web project with a reporting system.

title: School Management System with Accounting
description: This system is a WPF-based desktop application that provides an integrated platform for managing school operations, including financial management, inventory control, and student account tracking. It offers a comprehensive solution for schools to streamline their administrative tasks and improve overall efficiency.

KeyRoleDetails.details: Contributed to the development of an error handling mechanism to improve stability.
Collaborated with seniors to design and implement the software.
Worked on the business layer for an accounting system which included financial reports with pagination.

KeyAchievementDetails.details: Learned code structure, architecture in WPF, and version control.
Started as an intern and was promoted to Associate Software Engineer.
Implemented a data visualization feature, enhancing the usability of the application.
Contributed to the successful launch of the software.
Enhanced programming skills in C# .NET.
